basic_details.job_title: CSIR Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Project Scientist / Senior Project Associate Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Council of Scientific and Industrial Research (CSIR)
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

age_limit.details: All Posts: Upper age limit is relaxable upto 5 years in case of SC/ST, Divyangjan (PWD) and female applicants whereas 3 years in case of OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Doctoral Degree in Science OR Masters/Integrated Masters Degree in Engineering or Technology from recognized university or equivalent with relevant research experience
qualification.details: Project Scientist-I (PS-1-1): Doctoral Degree in Science OR Masters/Integrated Masters Degree in Engineering or Technology from recognized university or equivalent And 4 years experience in research & development. Area of Specialization: Analytical Chemistry/Chemical Sciences/Pharmaceutical Analysis/Pharmaceutical Sciences/Life Sciences. Project Scientist-I (PS-I-2): Doctoral Degree in Science OR Masters/Integrated Masters Degree in Engineering or Technology from recognized university or equivalent And 4 years experience in research & development. Area of Specialization: Engineering/Technology/Life Sciences/Pharmaceuticals. Project Scientist-I (PS-I-3): Doctoral Degree in Science OR Masters/Integrated Masters Degree in Engineering or Technology from recognized university or equivalent And 4 years experience in research & development. Area of Specialization: Engineering/Occupational Health and Safety/Environmental Sciences/Life Sciences/Pharmaceuticals. Project Scientist-II (PS-II-1): Doctoral Degree in Science OR Masters/Integrated Masters Degree in Engineering or Technology from recognized university or equivalent And 5 years experience in research & development. Area of Specialization: Engineering/Technology/Life Sciences/Pharmaceuticals. Project Scientist-III (PS-III-1): Doctoral Degree in Science or Masters/Integrated Masters in Engineering or Technology from a recognized University or equivalent And 7 years experience in research & development. Area of Specialization: Analytical Chemistry/Pharmaceutical Analysis/Pharmaceutical Sciences/Life Sciences. Senior Project Associate (Senior PAT-1): Masters/Integrated Masters Degree OR Bachelors degree in Engineering/Technology/Medicine OR Doctoral degree in Science/Pharma/MD/MS from recognized university with 2-3 years experience. Area of Specialization: Pharmacology/Pharmaceutical Sciences/Life Sciences. Project Scientist-III (PS-III-2): Doctoral Degree in Science or Masters/Integrated Masters in Engineering or Technology from a recognized University or equivalent And 7 years experience in research & development. Area of Specialization: Pharmacology/Pharmaceutical sciences/Toxicology/Life Sciences.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for CSIR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Scientist / Senior Project Associate posts at CSIR is scheduled for 30 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they report to the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the CSIR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies for the posts of Project Scientist and Senior Project Associate in the Council of Scientific and Industrial Research (CSIR) recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the CSIR posts?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification is a Doctoral Degree in Science OR a Masters/Integrated Masters Degree in Engineering or Technology from a recognized university, along with relevant research experience as specified for each post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Scientist and Senior Project Associate positions?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 42,000/- to Rs. 78,000/- per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA), depending on the specific post and experience level.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the CSIR recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the CSIR recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify a minimum or maximum age limit. However, age relaxation is provided for SC/ST, PWD, and OBC candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these CSIR posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these contractual positions will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates are required to attend the interview with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted in Mumbai, Maharashtra. The exact venue details will be available in the official notification PDF.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates apply online for this CSIR recruitment?
faq.answer: No, this recruitment is being conducted through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates are required to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time, rather than applying online.
